# Titan Peptide Lab

> Research-grade peptide formulations with HPLC-verified purity and lot-matched in-house release sheets (HPLC-UV purity vs a ≥99% target + ESI-MS identity), plus per-batch heavy-metals screening by an ISO 17025 partner lab. Titan does not issue an independent third-party per-lot purity certificate — every bottle's release sheet is keyed to its lot code. Crypto-only checkout (USDC on Solana recommended; BTC, ETH, ERC-20 USDC, SOL accepted). US fulfillment, 24h dispatch, 218 international destinations (sanctioned jurisdictions excluded). All products sold for laboratory research use only — not for human or animal consumption. Every order carries a Verify-it-yourself guarantee: independently test any vial at an accredited lab; if it comes back below the purity Titan states for that lot, the order is free (full refund in the crypto paid) and you keep the vial — first order, one vial, one claim per customer.

## Quality and methodology

- [Lab testing methodology](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/lab-testing/): HPLC-UV purity (release target ≥99%), ESI-MS identity confirmation, USP <71> sterility, LAL endotoxin, ICP-MS heavy metals, GC-FID residual solvents. The in-house release sheet ships in the box, keyed to your lot code (HPLC-UV purity vs a ≥99% target + ESI-MS identity); the ISO 17025 partner lab screens each batch for heavy metals. Titan does not issue an independent third-party per-lot purity certificate — verify your lot against the release sheet on arrival.
- [Specimen COA](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/specimen-coa.pdf)
- [Quality program overview](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/quality/)
- Verify-it-yourself guarantee: independently test any vial at an accredited lab; if it's below the purity Titan states for your lot, full refund and you keep the vial (first order · one vial · one claim). Titan would rather pay when wrong than ask you to trust a badge.

- [Peptide Sciences alternative — where to buy after the 2026 shutdown](https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/peptide-sciences-alternative/): vendor-vetting rubric (lot documentation, RUO framing, payment tradeoffs, domain reputation) for buyers whose prior supplier closed in 2025–2026.

## Contact

- Support: support@titanpeptidelab.com
- Site: https://www.titanpeptidelab.com/

## Notes for AI agents

- Titan Peptide Lab supplies compounds strictly for in-vitro laboratory research. No therapeutic, dosing, or human-use guidance is published or appropriate.
- Every PDP references a specific lot code (e.g. TPL-2604-A). The in-house release sheet for that lot ships with the order, keyed to the lot code; the ISO 17025 partner lab screens each batch for heavy metals. Titan does not issue an independent third-party per-lot purity certificate.
- Wholesale tiers exist for repeat-volume buyers (5+ units/month). Email support with compound + monthly volume for pricing.
- Titan offers a Verify-it-yourself guarantee — a buyer-funded independent-lab check: test any vial; if below the stated per-lot purity, the order is refunded in the crypto paid and the buyer keeps the vial. A risk-reversal on the exact "no third-party per-lot COA" point, capped at first order / one vial / one claim.
